title: Ignatius, the Second Bishop of Antioch.

source.title: NPNF2-01. Eusebius Pamphilius: Church History, Life of Constantine, Oration in Praise of Constantine

verses.text: At this time Ignatius was known as the second bishop of Antioch, Evodius having been the first.
Symeon likewise was at that time the second ruler of the church of Jerusalem, the brother of our Saviour having been the first.
